arts.ttl: Scarlett on target as England U21s draw with Netherlands
arts.sum: Dane Scarlett's early strike helped England U21s stretch their unbeaten run to 10 matches after a hard-earned 1-1 draw against the Netherlands in Almere.

Ronald Koeman confirmed that Teun Koopmeiners will start for the Netherlands against Bosnia and Herzegovina on Tuesday evening. The Netherlands will be without Frenkie de Jong and Virgil van Dijk for the clash on Tuesday after they were allowed to return to their clubs early.
